offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/month, inefficient manual processing causes delays in reimbursements. We automate the claims process instead of manual spreadsheets and email approvals.
problem: Inefficient manual processing of expense claims leading to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with a demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try claim submission form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
